evidence_file_plan.purpose: Maps core public claims to source evidence.
Records second-pass review and unresolved source issues.
Links visible claims to source, status, and allowed strength.
Records copy changes made after source review.

execution_steps: Verify the page's major claims against its source packet or source register.
Record load-bearing sources and the specific claims they support.
Add an external or second-pass reviewer note documenting remaining source risk.
